payload.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Introduce canonical UOR address type and BLAKE3 content addressing" in phase "UOR Content-Addressed Identity Migration"?
groundedNodeLabels: Introduce canonical UOR address type and BLAKE3 content addressing
Content-addressed identity uses the designated BLAKE3 pipeline.
Replace ad hoc Victor memory identity with deterministic UOR addressing so memory writes, lookups, deduplication, and supersession lineage are cryptographically and semantically stable.
Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity
Rewire memory, tier, and graph structures onto UOR identity
Victor memory supports a canonical UOR address type.
recommendedNextActions: Implement existing SHA-based integrity paths remain backward-compatible during migration
